dod.preamble: Commit this session's review artifacts and open a PR. No engine/product code changes - .lume/ state only.

items.text: All untracked .lume/ review state is committed: reviews 2026-06-11-03 and -04 (findings.md + result.json), gap records G11-G20, and review workstreams 0023/0024 + this workstream 0025.
No product/engine code changed - the diff touches only .lume/ (and the branch's own metadata).
Test suite still green (nothing code-level changed).
A PR is open against main summarising both reviews and noting the queue plans remain unadopted (operator's call).

check.command: gh pr view land-session-reviews --json state -q .state | grep -q OPEN
